business_question: How many catalog units were sold per product category during Q1 of 2002?
business_context: The catalog operations team tracks unit velocity by product category to manage reorder points and plan catalog page depth.

aggregation_logic.Total Catalog Units Sold: SUM(cs_quantity) grouped by product category for year Q1 of 2002

chain_of_thought: Use catalog_sales as the fact table for catalog channel unit data.
Join to item to get the product category hierarchy level.
Apply date_dim filter for year Q1 of 2002.
Sum cs_quantity per group to get total units shipped in catalog channel.
Order descending to surface highest-volume product attributes.
sql_answer:
SELECT
  i.i_category AS i_category,
  SUM(cs.cs_quantity) AS total_catalog_units
FROM catalog_sales cs
JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2002 AND d.d_qoy = 1
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY total_catalog_units DESC;
